ie.isde.metadata.translator

Class TranslatorImplementation

  • java.lang.Object
    • ie.isde.metadata.translator.TranslatorImplementation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Translator

    public class TranslatorImplementation
extends Object
implements Translator
    This class facilitates different serializations of Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata by translating ISO19139 XML into other target formats.
    Since:
    1.0
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Adam Leadbetter

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TranslatorImplementation(String recordFile) 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void main(String[] args)
      Translates an ISO XML record from the Irish Spatial Data Exchange to either World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Data Catalog Vocabulary (DCAT) profile as Terse Triple Language (TTL) or Schema.org as a JSON object conforming to the JSON-LD Linked Data profile.
      String toDCAT()
      Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a W3C Data Catalog Vocabulary representation
      String toSchemaOrg()
      Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a Schema.org representation

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • TranslatorImplementation

        public TranslatorImplementation(String recordFile)
                         throws MalformedURLException,
                                SAXException,
                                ParserConfigurationException,
                                IOException
        Throws:
        MalformedURLException
        SAXException
        ParserConfigurationException
        IOException

    • Method Detail

      • toDCAT

        public String toDCAT()
        Description copied from interface: Translator
        Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a W3C Data Catalog Vocabulary representation
        Specified by:
        toDCAT in interface Translator
        Returns:
        String The DCAT representation of the ISO metadata as a Terse Triple Language serialization

      • toSchemaOrg

        public String toSchemaOrg()
        Description copied from interface: Translator
        Translates the Irish Spatial Data Exchange metadata record supplied in ISO19115/19139 XML to a Schema.org representation
        Specified by:
        toSchemaOrg in interface Translator
        Returns:
        String The Schema.org representation of the ISO metadata as a JSON-LD serialization

      • main

        public static void main(String[] args)
                 throws UnsupportedOperationException,
                        IllegalArgumentException,
                        MalformedURLException,
                        SAXException,
                        ParserConfigurationException,
                        IOException
        Translates an ISO XML record from the Irish Spatial Data Exchange to either World Wide Web Consortium (W3C) Data Catalog Vocabulary (DCAT) profile as Terse Triple Language (TTL) or Schema.org as a JSON object conforming to the JSON-LD Linked Data profile.
        Parameters:
        args -
        Throws:
        UnsupportedOperationException
        IllegalArgumentException
        MalformedURLException
        SAXException
        ParserConfigurationException
        IOException
        Since:
        1.0
